Knowledge Graph Builder for Databricks

API Reference

  • OntoBricks Application Packages
  • FastAPI application (UI server)
  • api – External REST API (mounted at /api)
  • back.core – Core Domain Logic
    • Helpers
    • Logging
    • Task Manager
    • Subpackages
  • back.core.databricks – Databricks Integration
  • back.core.graphdb – Pluggable Graph Database Backends
  • back.core.graphql – GraphQL Schema Generation
  • back.core.industry – Industry Standard Ontology Importers
  • back.core.reasoning – OWL 2 RL & SWRL Inference
  • back.objects – Application domain objects
  • back.core.sqlwizard – LLM-Assisted SQL Generation
  • back.core.triplestore – Pluggable RDF/Graph Backends
  • back.core.w3c – W3C Standard Parsers & Generators
  • front.routes & internal JSON API – Web UI and HTMX/API helpers
  • shared.config & front.config – Settings and constants
  • agents – LLM Agents & Tools
